title: Thiruvadigai Temple, Panruti
tagline: Thiruvadigai Temple, Panruti — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thiruvathigai Veerateswarar Temple (also Virattaneshwara Temple, Tamil: வீரட்டானேசுவரர் ) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva.
overview.description: Thiruvathigai Veerateswarar Temple (also Virattaneshwara Temple, Tamil: வீரட்டானேசுவரர் ) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva. It is situated in Thiruvathigai village which is about 2 kilometres east from the town of Panruti in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Veerattaaneswarar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Thiripurasundari.

topPlaces.description: Virudhachalam, also called Vriddhachalam, is a Municipality and taluk headquarters in Cuddalore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The ancient name of this town is Thirumudhukundram.

topPlaces.name: Kolanjiappar temple
topPlaces.description: Kolanjiappar temple in Manavalanallur, a village on the outskirts of Virudhachalam in Cuddalore district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Murugan. Constructed in the Dravidian architecture, the temple is located in the Virudhachalam - Manavalanallur Road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thiruvadigai Temple, Panruti?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thiruvadigai Temple, Panruti is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thiruvadigai Temple, Panruti?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (103 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (102 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thiruvadigai Temple, Panruti?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thiruvadigai Temple, Panruti at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thiruvadigai Temple, Panruti?
faq.a: Stays in Thiruvadigai Temple, Panruti start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thiruvadigai Temple, Panruti?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rajendirapattinam, Vriddhachalam block, Vriddachalam division, Vriddachalam taluk, Virudhachalam.
